programme.title: Cutting It: In the ATL
programme.desc: Beautii debuts her new products at the year's biggest beauty show but Mushiya wants to steal the spotlight. Maja saves the day when Dedra's not ready; Pat smells trouble.

programme.title: Cutting It: In the ATL
programme.desc: The ladies go head-to-head in the battle to be crowned ATL's Head Beauty Boss in Charge! It's an all-out war to get top honors but surprises shake the bosses. Maja hatches an evil plan; will she keep her crown?

programme.title: Cutting It: In the ATL
programme.desc: Dedra discovers Maja's shocking secret, and plots revenge with a new scheming friend. Mushiya and Maja battle over their natural hair lines at a beauty event. LaKenya is forced to choose sides.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar prepares to drop her next album, while taping a new season of her talk show. When Vince reveals to Tamar that she'll also be competing on "Dancing With The Stars," she's concerned about balancing it all.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar hits the road to promote her album in NYC, then rushes to DC for an event with April. Tamar plans her next music video and performs an emotional dance inspired the time when Vince was gravely ill.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar travels to the Caribbean to shoot a music video, and worries about losing rehearsal time with her new dance partner. Tamar gets advice from Toni about DWTS and a troubling text on Vince's phone...

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim questions Angela's integrity and lack of professionalism. Kelly Rowland needs Kim's help finding a hot style for a high-fashion editorial shoot. Angela and Terry go on a house call from hell.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: After diffusing an insulting situation with reality diva Omarosa, Kim gives a candid interview about her painful childhood. Angela steals one of Kim's clients. Everyone has had enough of Charity.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim gives Angela one more chance at the salon. Jazz and Terry trick Kim into a blind date. China makes her presence known by refusing to give Angela her station and pushing Anthony to his limit.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: With the details of Hank's sex scandal now out in the open, Kendra heads to London for work and play. When a racy photo of Kendra and a former footballer hits the press, Hank questions if Kendra's gone too far.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky es víctima otra vez de la obsesión de Ernesto. Él va hasta la playa y la secuestra. Ángela Amenábar está cada vez más cerca de Lorenzo. Juntos, ven un local y deciden ser socios en un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín sufre al perder nuevamente a Vicky. Las autoridades encuentran un cadáver y todos piensan lo peor. Martín llega al hotel donde está Ernesto. Lorenzo sorprende a Ángela con su ex. Blanca descubre dónde sigue latiendo el corazón de su madre.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky sufre la crueldad de un amor enfermizo que intenta separarla de Martín. Ernesto, en su locura y rabia, termina quemándole la cara a Vicky. Blanca siente miedo de perder a su papá y, con César, encuentran a Lorenzo en casa de Ángela.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín es atacado por sus enemigos. Diana lo traiciona, prometiéndole que iba a entregar a su aliado, el peligroso Ernesto. Lorenzo llega a casa de Ángela y ella le confiesa su amor. Un beso despierta emociones que parecían estar en el pasado.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín toma venganza con sus propias manos, condena a Ernesto a sufrir el trauma de un rostro quemado. Así le devuelve el dolor que Vicky siente. Llega un día clave para Lorenzo y Ángela, ella duda sobre.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ángela y Lorenzo se dejan vencer por el deseo y los sentimientos, él no sospecha que la mujer que lo perturba ahora tiene el corazón de su Aurora. Elizabeth le devuelve la esperanza a Vicky. Blanca tiene un mal presentimiento sobre las carreras.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ángela amenaza con desaparecer de la vida de Lorenzo luego de confesarle que sabía todo desde el principio. Lorenzo se siente engañado, en desventaja, y le reclama a sus hijos que no le hayan contado. Vicky insiste en operarse a escondidas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín descubre que Vicky va a operarse con Elizabeth. Pero Elizabeth cae en manos de la policía mientras intenta intervenir a su próxima víctima. Lorenzo y Ángela no se ponen de acuerdo y ella le echa en cara que fue él quien no la quiso.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo se da la oportunidad de amar como la primera vez a Ángela. Ernesto manipula nuevamente a Vicky amenazando la vida de Martín. Ellos deciden ponerse fuera del alcance de Ernesto. Diego contrata a César para que corra en su escudería.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky toma una decisión desesperada cuando ve a Martín en peligro y desconoce que un milagro de la vida está en camino. A Lorenzo le es revelada la verdad sobre su historia de amor y desamor. Gustavo confiesa lo que realmente pasó con Sebastián.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín pierde a Vicky por las amenazas de Ernesto, encerrado en una cárcel de máxima seguridad. Él está dispuesto a vengarse con el bebé en camino. Diana llega al límite de su locura por amor. Blanca se opone a la relación de Lorenzo y Ángela.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y Ángela tienen una noche de pasión y es Félix quien los descubre en la cama, ella confiesa que nunca volvió con su ex. César enfrenta a su verdadero papá y su nueva familia. Martín va en busca de Vicky y la sorprende con una propuesta.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Cuando el amor está a punto de ganar, otra trampa del destino se interpone en las vidas de Lorenzo y Martín para cambiar lo que más desean. Ángela se marcha a Washington dejando una nota de despedida. César toca la gloria en las carreras.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y Ángela finalmente logran hacer su amor realidad con la bendición de toda la familia. Martín y Vicky borran para siempre de su vida el fantasma de Ernesto y su obsesión maligna. El deseo de cumpleaños de Aurorita es ser la bella durmiente.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Happy holidays! Join the America's Test Kitchen cast as they share their favorite holiday recipes and memories.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget make Easy Pancakes. Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of turkey bacon. Lisa reviews syrup dispensers, and Dan demystifies the science of baking soda and browning. Then, Becky makes Julia decadent Creamy French-Style Scrambled Eggs.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The holidays are stressful enough. We created a foolproof rolled butter cookie dough that tasted great and can be turned into an array of different cookies.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Ashley shows Bridget how to make a Crumb-Crusted Rack of Lamb that is perfect for the holidays. Next, Adam shows Julia his top picks of electric knives. Finally, Christie shows Julia how to make a showstopping Brussels Sprout Gratin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia reveal the secrets to making the perfect Gingerbread Layer Cake at home. Lisa reviews stovetop kettles. Finally, Keith makes a foolproof recipe for Sticky Toffee Pudding Cakes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dan makes Julia a festive recipe for Easy Holiday Sugar Cookies. Adam reveals his top pick for parchment paper, and Lisa reviews silicone baking mats. Lan Lam then makes Bridget the Best Lemon Bars.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Happy holidays! Join the America's Test Kitchen cast as they share their favorite holiday recipes and memories.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Orange, Cranberry, and Mint Pavlova, Holiday Eggnog; tasting of vanilla; review of cocktail tools.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lan Lam makes Bridget Lancaster Cranberry Curd Tart with Almond Crust. Jack Bishop challenges Julia Collin Davison to a tasting of blue cheeses. Keith Dresser makes Julia Wheat Berry Salad with Radicchio, Dried Cherries, and Pecans.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Bottom Round Roast Beef with Zip-Style Sauce. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for measuring spoons. Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster Almond Boneless Chicken.

programme.title: The Royce White Show
programme.desc: Royce White hits it hard, fast and unapologetically.

programme.title: Law & Border
programme.desc: Ben Bergquam exposes the invasion of the southern border.

programme.desc: A Minneapolis businessman buys big companies and makes himself rich in the process.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Behind the wheel of a Triumph Spitfire, Anita Manning and Raj Bisram shop in Norfolk. Anita learns about a forgotten global dancing phenomenon, while Raj heads to Blicking Hall to find out about its controversial former owner.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Raj Bisram travel through Suffolk, Kent, and Surrey. Anita visits a former silk mill with an incredible royal connection. Raj hears about the birth of interior design and the pioneering artist behind it -- William Morris.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The gorgeous Kent towns of Deal, Sandwich, and Faversham host Anita Manning and Raj Bisram for some antique shopping. Raj has soared ahead with huge profits, but Anita finds an Eastern deity figure she hopes will attract big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning's big win at the last auction is proving a sticky wicket for Raj Bisram, who's keen to avoid the wooden spoon. Raj learns about WWII's Operation Dynamo. Anita uncovers the story behind the bloody murder of Thomas Becket.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon set off from the midlands in a 1970 Citroen DS20. Phil spends a lot of cash on a 19th-century butter churn, while Catherine finds two attractive 1940s compacts.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling around in a classic Citroen, Catherine Southon finds a nice croquet set and a rare 1930's novelty biscuit tin, while Phil Serrell learns how flying boats gave us the word 'airport.'

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon decides to change her buying strategy, going for more of Philip Serrell's rust-and-woodworm fare. Phil diverts to the beach and asks a local fisherman if he has some antique chandlery to sell!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to Porthcurno to see the incredible cables that stretch from this little village to South America, Australia, and India. Phil Serrell goes for a ride on a replica of the Puffing Devil.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon heads to the Royal Mint and finds out how Sir Isaac Newton revolutionized coins to prevent forgers. Phil Serrell gets a lesson in the culture at the Bristol Old Vic and discovers why it's a miracle the building still stands.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle are in Northumberland. Paul discovers the Morpeth Olympics and Claire learns about the female Indiana Jones, Gertrude Bell. Everything's rosy until Claire mentions she loves militaria -- Paul's specialty!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Claire Rawle finds out about the Tynemouth Volunteer Life Brigade and Paul Laidlaw visits a military observation post in Blyth. And Paul finds some RAF stereoscopic aerial reconnaissance photographs of German U-boats at a great price.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Claire Rawle discovers the history of big game fishing in the 1930s, while Paul Laidlaw sets off to rendezvous in a secret WWII bunker. Paul buys a pair of Charles Barlow vases, and Claire picks up an early 20th-century spectacle case.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw finds a rare 18th-century puzzle jug, and Claire Rawle some Shelley porcelain. Paul discovers how Hull was vital to thousands of Jews fleeing from Tsarist Russia and Claire indulges her passion for all things railway.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the final, Paul Laidlaw hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head will earn him a huge profit. Claire Rawle buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Will Claire be the comeback kid and crush the mighty Laidlaw?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Dumfries House near Ayr in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Bridlington's Spa Royal Hall, the team nominate their ideal age of elegance.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team examine objects harking back to the construction of the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include a medicine chest from early Victorian times and rare Irish plate buckets.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the Bishop's Palace in Wells, Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects under scrutiny include a valuable bracelet once gifted by Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts are in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items discovered include a photograph of Winston Churchill and an old theatrical costume.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects found in Dulwich include an early illustration by madcap artist Heath Robinson.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team brave the wet weather at Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team choose their favourite moments and give updates on star items.

programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Elle and Inga, 17-year-old cousins from Norway, herd reindeer; they and their families accompany reindeer herds on an annual migration.

programme.title: Reindeer Family and Me
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to the wilderness of Lapland where he visits with the indigenous Sami people, reindeer, and sees the Northern Lights.

programme.title: Running With Reindeer

programme.title: Sharks: The Truth
programme.desc: Sharks have evolved over millions of years, honed to make them the most effective underwater hunters on Earth.

programme.title: Sharks: Size Matters

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Sharks

programme.title: Sharks: On Their Best Behavior
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mike deGruy examines shark evolution, hunting, feeding, reproduction and defenses.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Spinner dolphins hunt shoals of lanternfish while dodging giant rays.

programme.title: Dolphins: Spy in the Pod
programme.desc: Revealing the family life of the orca and dolphins that wear sponges on their noses.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella travels to Venice to find inspiration for a glittering Christmas buffet party and returns with recipes and party ideas.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Cooking
programme.desc: Nigel Slater shows us how to prepare five different sweet and sour dishes.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: A guide to stress free festive food; smoked salmon fishcakes, pan-fried duck with redcurrant jelly sauce and a chocolate mascarpone mousse.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel makes comfort foods that hits the spot.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel Slater makes the prospect of entertaining a treat when he transforms Christmas leftovers in scrumptious meals.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Christmas Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel Slater creates simple dishes from Christmas leftovers.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson shares the secrets of her Italian roast chicken, served alongside a saffron orzotto; Nigella prepares coffee ice cream for dessert, inspired by the ice cream parlors of Florence; a chocolate olive oil cake provides an extra treat.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Pork loin stuffed with Parma ham and oregano, served alongside her speedy mock mash and lazy person's vignarola.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Liquorice pudding; Sardinian sun-dried and toasted couscous; butterflied leg of lamb; baby aubergines with oregano and roasted red onion.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Lamb chops with mint; chilli and golden potatoes; ruby red plum and amoretti crumble; farro risotto with mushrooms.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates the quirkiness and individuality of London fashion in her kitchen, proving it's more about creativity than the price tag when it comes to getting your food looking and tasting good.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel makes some simple colorful canapés that are perfect for a party and creates a sophisticated jelly for grown-ups.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: London makes Rachel feel nostalgic about her childhood, so she visits an ice-cream lab in North London and makes a firm family favorite - Strudel.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel explores London's fast food scene, and whips up berry tartlets with cream cheese frosting and cauliflower cheese burgers.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel prepares her favourite food for the perfect lazy day, cycles along a canal, visits her friend Tom's urban garden, and whips up a shepherdless pie.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates London's love with the East as she makes sticky chicken with Malaysian salad and soft steamed buns.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel celebrates Londoners' love of tradition as she puts her own twist on the traditional fry-up and makes a simple one-tray roast.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel joins an unusual supper club on an old tube carriage and makes sausage and mash for taxi drivers.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel visits a basement Norwegian style salmon smokehouse and a shop where the shelves are stocked with preserves made on a hob at home.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook: London
programme.desc: Rachel goes for a decadent champagne afternoon tea in Mayfair and makes some finger-licking ribs.

programme.title: No Kitchen Required

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An inexperienced bar owner calls on Jon after hiring a hard-partying manager with no industry knowledge to run Broadway Club in Tooele, Utah.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Layton, Utah, Jon confronts Brandon, the emotionally exhausted owner of Linda Lou's Time for Two, who has bled himself and his mother dry trying to keep the bar open.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Midvale, Utah, to meet The Union owner Bill, who is over $500,000 in debt and hasn't picked up any of the bar knowledge required to help his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in New Mexico to help Mike, the owner of Lucky 66 Bowl, who is over a million dollars in debt and keeps driving customers and employees out the door with his temper.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in Albuquerque, New Mexico, to help Commander Rudy and his staff recruit young veterans to become members and inject new life into his VFW Post 6216 bar and hall.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits Tracy, California, to help the divorced owners of Grant Bar & Lounge clean up their act and bring cohesion to their competing nightclub/restaurant concept.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When the owner of Jolt'n Joe's in San Diego was diagnosed with cancer, he began leaning on his manager, but a broken promise over equity threatens to run the bar into the ground.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon, joined by rapper T-Pain, is in Sacramento, California, to convince Kings fan Chris he needs to change his sports bar concept if he's ever going to make money.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to Orange County, California, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch Judges the Miss Malibu Beach Bikini Contest, his willpower is tested by two competitors who will do anything to get his vote. Later, Cody designs the "Windjet,” an innovative, new lifesaving boat/waverunner combination.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ befriends Max, a homeless eccentric who claims that he was once a famous Hollywood Costume designer. When Max dies suddenly, CJ learns he was rich and has left her $4 million in his will. Manny joins junior lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: At the annual Baywatch Lifeguard Bachelor Auction, Mitch is "bought" for $5,000 by a wealthy socialite. The relationship gets complicated when they get stranded on an island and their social status is reversed. Cody joins a local roller hockey team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: LA is in the throes of a severe heat wave! Hundreds of thousands of people head to the beach. Lifeguarding gets more chaotic for the team when the Secret Service shows up to inform them that the President is going to go jogging on the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: To sponsor the Special Olympics at the beach, Mitch hires MTV DJ Jenny McCarthy to throw "Beachblast:" a live televised tournament. After being evicted from his apartment, Cody moves in with CJ and Caroline, creating a surplus of sexual tension.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ's mother, a former Las Vegas showgirl, arrives in town seeking CJ's help to get away from her mobster ex-boyfriend. When CJ and her mom are held hostage on a remote beach, it is up to Mitch and Cody to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Australia's Uncle Toby's International Ironman Competition comes to LA. The Baywatch girls think all is fair in sports and convince the guys that they should compete as equals, setting the stage for a series of pranks between the men and women.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Controversy generated by Donna's appearance in Playboy magazine divides the Baywatch lifeguards. When an earthquake triggers a rockslide, burying a bus full of junior lifeguards, Mitch, Samantha, Cody and Donna try to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rescuing a group of fishermen and tourists from a pier fire, Samantha and L.A. fire chief Captain Huntingdon form an elite joint Search and Rescue unit. Meanwhile, Cody asks CJ to paint his portrait, and Mitch receives some strange PI work.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna and Caroline work with Heal the Bay after a recent rainstorm washes inland pollutants into the waters off Santa Monica. Mitch falls ill after he unknowing swims over sunken drums of toxic chemicals.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch has been chosen Flash Magazine's Bachelor of the Month, a designation that leads to wild complications. Stephanie is making plans for her wedding to Tom, but her sister Caroline keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and Tom go on their honeymoon in a two-mast schooner with a group of troubled teenagers, with Mitch and Neely along for help. All is going well until they get trapped in a hurricane and the ship starts sinking!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch gets his “15 minutes of fame” when he rescues Jay Leno from choking, and a female talk show host from drowning. Caroline and CJ adopt a stray dog swimming in the ocean that mystically reminds them of Stephanie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Caroline, Neely and Manny rescue three orphan teenage boys from drowning, Caroline seeks out the enigmatic, mysterious youth who helped her rescue one of the boys. Neely's ex-husband returns, complicating her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julianne says Leighton "lied his way through life" & turned daughter, Mariah, into a liar & con artist. In a tense in-studio showdown, Julianne and couple face-off. Hotel security was called before the show, & what happened after arriving to the studio?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ted Williams was living on the streets in Columbus, Ohio, his life ruined by substance abuse. Ted became an overnight celebrity after The Columbus Dispatch posted a web video.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valerie says daughter, Alyssa, 19, is a lazy mom refusing to get a job & falls asleep on the couch, leaving her baby unattended. And actor Antonia Sabato Jr. discusses his campaign for a new law banning medical marijuana in homes with children under 18.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pageant mom Lori & daugther Alaska, 9, made news bleaching the girl's teeth & dyeing her eyelashes. Alaska's pic posted on TheDirty.com, with a man's claim he performed a sexual act while looking at the photo. Plus, Brittany, 21, had sex with a 14-yr-old.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From curing rare forms of cancer to foreseeing mass destruction, to freeing others from sickness and sin, Julia believes she is "God's chosen prophet". Parents, Mark and Cheryll, worry their daughter is mentally ill with deep concern for the grandkids.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany & Sheka aren't alone in accusations ex-boyfriend Erik lies & scams constantly. Dr. Phil talks to ex-girlfriends Torri & Courtney & ex-wife, Martha, all sharing in Erik's deceitful behavior. Erik's revealed as an alleged con man--will he change?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monica's old life: English teacher, marathon runner, happy. Now 90 lbs. and no solid food with a C-diff diagnosis, she chains herself to bed to avoid sleepwalking or binge eating. It's a full-time job for mom, Stephanie; friend Breanna suspects enabling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La Directora Shepard toma un riesgo absoluto al encontrarse a solas con un informante que tenía información sobre Le Grenouille, pero en encuentro sale mal y el contacto es asesinado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de un contramaestre que aparece inadvertidamente en una fotografía tomada de forma casual por un fotógrafo ciego.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs ignora el pepeleo burocrático asociado a su posición como director activo y lidera la investigación del una víctima de asesinato encontrada en un taxi que se dirigía al cuartel general de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras que la directora de NCIS vuelve de un controversial viaje Europeo y Gibbs y sus agentes se preparan para polígrafos por la Seguridad Nacional, secretos ocultos del equipo salen a la luz.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo trata de encontrar una vínculo común entre cuatro hombres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.desc: The ladies stage an intervention to discuss Mattie's belligerent behavior when she drinks, Walt pranks the girls and they retaliate, and the gang says goodbye.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast sits down with host Christine Lakin to relive the craziest, drunkest, and most dramatic moments from the party house, including some never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings back 12 seasoned Redneck Island veterans and 12 eager new rookies to battle it out for $100,000. At the first challenge, the players dive into the competition as they fight it out to claim victory.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The game is turned on its head as one player quits the competition and another is seriously injured. The challenge turns physical as the teams fight to stay afloat.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The players must rise to the occasion as a daunting challenge pushes their limits to new heights. One of the veterans gets life-changing news from home. A powerful new alliance forms that changes the course of the game.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The power continues to shift in the game, raising the stakes to a new high as the teams brawl it out at the challenge. Old romantic flames reignite between Margaret and Josh.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rival alliances divide the house as a new power-team emerges. The players have a tough time choking down what Steve is serving up at the challenge. Two best friends face off against each other in an emotional Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams hang on for dear life as they fight for victory at the challenge. A wild night of fun leads to chaos when the party gets out of hand. A tough Pit decision threatens to tear friendships apart.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in hiding is sniffed out quickly by the K-9 unit, a couple gets caught lying when an officer recognizes them, and a woman's dogs save her a trip to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue a mentally unwell man, a driver is arrested for crystal meth possession after his passengers incriminate him, and an arrested suspect apologizes to his son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.desc: Una serie de cadáveres, encontrados frente a la costa de Miami, resulta ser obra de piratas modernos. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a limo driver at a Kid Rock concert. With Kid as a leading suspect, the CSIs find themselves backstage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman, dressed as a mermaid, is discovered floating in a bed of kelp. The CSIs search Manhattan for her murderer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A marine is found dead in Central Park. Across town, the team investigates the death of a woman found in a burned out car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a security guard is stabbed to death, Mac and Flack rush to the scene. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bungee jumpers witness a death on the Brooklyn Bridge, Mac and his new love interest Peyton Driscoll are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Holly Golightly look-alikes rob a jewelry store the detectives find themselves questioning the girls’ involvement in the world of blood diamonds.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a vodka spokeswoman dressed as an ice queen, and murdered with her scepter at a promotional event.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En una prueba de fe, Mac Taylor asigna a los detectives Danny Messer y Aiden Burn a uno de los casos más difíciles del equipo de CSI hasta ahora.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un robo en Chinatown sale mal cuando asesinan a un guardia de seguridad y el otro dispara por error a un tanque de gasolina y dos de los ladrones se queman vivos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El pánico sobreviene en la Bolsa Mercantil de Nueva York cuando abandonan un maletín, rastrean su origen hasta un corredor de bolsa que desapareció misteriosamente.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando a un oficial de la policía montada de la ciudad de Nueva York lo tiran de su caballo con un tiro, el detective Mac Taylor y el equipo peinan la ciudad en busca de sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La electrocución de un joven en el tercer riel del metro conduce al mundo de un deporte extremo donde correr riesgos es parte del juego.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Tanglewood (S1 Ep13)
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un chico suburbano encontrado muerto a golpes en Van Cortlandt Park lleva al equipo de CSI a Tanglewood, hogar de un grupo de aspirantes a gánsters.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren el cuerpo de un adolescente metido en una caja de 60 x 60 x 60 cm enterrada en la arena en Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Danny Messer se encuentran tras la pista de un asesino escurridizo cuando una futura novia cae muerta el día de su boda.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el robo de un camión, los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren un cuerpo aplastado bajo diez toneladas de acero.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando unos pandilleros jóvenes asesinan al dueño de una lujosa tienda de vinos en el Bronx, el equipo de CSI debe trabajar para encontrar evidencias que vinculen a alguien con el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un festejo por la publicación de un informe sobre corrupción policial termina en un derramamiento de sangre, cuando suenan disparos en el piso 65 de un rascacielos de Midtown.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren a una mujer muerta entre las sábanas sucias de una lavandería industrial.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: José desaparece y Carolina tiene que vender un riñón por algo de dinero. Por otro lado, Teresa descubre que Israel le es infiel y por venganza hace público su engaño con un cartel.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Ania y Jaime se separaron porque él se obsesionó con el juego. También, Linda e Ismael tienen un hogar de ancianos, pero ella no está de acuerdo con algunas prácticas de él.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rotsen perdió a su familia en un accidente de tránsito y el conductor se fugó. También, Joana padece vitiligo, una enfermedad que le causa más problemas sociales que médicos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Daniel es una chica con aspecto masculino y para cambiar su identidad necesita a sus papás. Por otro lado, Paola es la asistente personal de Sandra, una modelo que la sobreexplota.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edgar está a favor del crimen ocurrido en Orlando y Patricia se ofendió. También, Pedro tiene orden de deportación a Honduras, pero no quiere que su familia regrese con él.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Sonia trajo de Cuba a su novio Pedro para casarse con él, pero en la despedida de soltera tiene sexo con un stripper. El hijo de María murió ahogado con una de las piezas de un Fidget Spinner.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Sofía es un transexual que sufrió maltrato de su padre por su condición sexual y en una pelea lo mató. También, Izrael compró una casa en mal estado para venderla, pero su hijo se enfermó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Karen descubre que el entrenador de natación de su hija es el mismo que abusó de ella. También, Lucía tiene una web que pone en contacto a indocumentadas con señores ricos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La madre de Federico y Violeta es adicta a los opiáceos y va al veterinario para conseguirlos. En otro caso, Josefina le rentó a Mauricio una vivienda y ahora lo denunció a Inmigración.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Claudia estaba casada con un pastor, pero él mantenía una relación homosexual con Alberto. En otro caso, Verónica publicó en Internet una falsa Alerta Amber en contra de David.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Unos jóvenes practican saltos y acrobacias utilizando la arquitectura de su condominio y se enfrentaron con la encargada. Paulette contrató a Anna como modelo y su marido la apuñaló.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Susana es una actriz porno, denuncia que la violaron en una película, no pudo decir la palabra clave. Katia consume sangre humana desde que era una niña como parte de una tradición familiar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: To get off the hook for tax fraud, Norm is pressured to sleep with his IRS auditor.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's ex-husband crashes their daughter's wedding celebration.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier, Cliff, Woody, and Norm have a disastrous evening at the drive-in.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm jeopardizes Cliff's job when he covers his route for a day.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An old bet forces Sam to choose between getting married or losing Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An astute reporter visits Cheers and is turned off by Sam's arrogance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Nick returns to win back Carla's love when his new wife leaves him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm's forced to take a promotion that entails firing employees.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: With much trepidation, Diane decides to leave Cheers and travel to Europe with Frasier, who has been offered a temporary position at the University of Bologna.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla hires an Englishwoman to fill Diane's place while she's in Europe.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla takes revenge on her despised former high school principal.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In a cliff-hanging season finale, Frasier proposes to Diane while in Europe, wanting to get married the very next day.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Rebecca seek psychiatric help for getting in the mood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The guys of Cheers get stranded when they take a road trip on Route 66.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's psychic asks her to take over her spiritual reading business.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is more nervous than his son when Frederick competes in the National Spelling Championship, and the elder Crane ends up ruining everything for his offspring.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Dos Rivales
programme.desc: Los Treviño y Los Guereña mantienen una rivalidad originada muchos años atrás. Por necesidad de dinero, el heredero de los Treviño, y la heredera de los Guereña, tienen que disfrazarse usando ropa del sexo opuesto para proteger y vender sus ranchos.

programme.title: Escuela para solteras
programme.desc: Amador quiere casarse con sus novia. La jefa de la familia le pone una condición: Todas las hermanas mayores que ella tienen que casarse primero y por orden de edades. Siendo su novia la menor, Amador tiene que buscarles marido a todas sus cuñadas.

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Desde mi cielo
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a la adolescente de 14 años Susie Salmon, ella deja atrás una vida inconclusa. Ahora, desde su lugar en un extraño pero hermoso mundo intermedio, ella debe ayudar a su padre a atrapar a su asesino.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: Maravilla
programme.desc: Maravilla" can drop the world's best boxers with his lightning strikes and floor the most beautiful women with his devastating looks. But speaking truth to power has left him a virtual pariah in the unjust world of professional boxing.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Sospecha Mortal
programme.desc: Richard Gere es Peck, y Andy Garcia es Raymond Avila, un investigador decidido a llevar a Peck a la justicia en este thriller policial emocionante.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: Chicas pesadas 2
programme.desc: Las Plásticas están de regreso en la secuela del gran éxito Mean Girls… ¡y ahora la hermandad es más moderna, divertida y feroz que nunca!

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: Jennifer López interpreta a una soltera que se enamora del hombre perfecto justo cuando decide ser madre en esta comedia romántica de éxito sobre el noviazgo, el amor, el matrimonio y la paternidad, pero no necesariamente en ese orden.

programme.title: Showgirls: lo prohibido
programme.desc: Conflictos de seducción, pasión y poder se revelan cuando los creadores de 'Instinto Básico' destapan el aparentemente glamoroso mundo del espectáculo en Las Vegas con esta controvertida película protagonizada por Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Implacable
programme.desc: Max, en su imaginación, es un implacable galán que hace suspirar a las mujeres. Su vida dará un giro cuando convence a Dan, un joven listo, atleta y culto, a que lo tome bajo su tutela, y ambos compiten por el amor de la misma mujer.

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Sid 6.7 La Máquina Asesina
programme.desc: Es una combinación de las personalidades de unos 200 asesinos famosos. Es Sid 6.7, una creación de realidad virtual diseñada para probar a la policía de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: Presentado por Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey es el brioso relato de una misteriosa y mítica leyenda china de artes marciales excitantes e incesantes.

programme.title: Highlander III: Dimensión final
programme.desc: En este tercer capítulo de la franquicia de acción trepidante, el inmortal Connor MacLeod está destinado a una batalla decisiva con su despiadado enemigo eterno, Kane.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Plantados
programme.desc: Cuando Ramón descubre a Mauricio, uno de los guías carcelarios más crueles que recuerda cuando fue encarcelado en Cuba y ahora vive en Florida, empieza a recordar algunos casos traumáticos vividos con su torturador.

programme.title: El Alien y yo
programme.desc: Una banda de punk contrata a Pepe, un tecladista con síndrome de Down, pero es tan talentoso que termina por opacarlos en el escenario.

programme.title: Cuando la navidad era joven
programme.desc: Un representante que necesita una canción exitosa llama a su novia de la escuela y le pide la canción de Navidad que ella escribió. Del autor Robert Tate Miller (Hope at Christmas), con la canción de la nueve veces ganadora del Grammy Sheryl Crow.

programme.title: Regresando a casa en Navidad
programme.desc: Kate tiene la gran idea de reunir para Navidad a su familia separada y volver as antigua casa. El problema es que alguien vive allí y no es muy amable.

programme.title: Miracle on Christmas
programme.desc: Durante las vacaciones de Navidad, María experimenta pruebas emocionales que le hacen cuestionar su fe hasta que llega un visitante y su marido recibe un milagro inesperado.

programme.title: Un casamiento de Navidad perruno
programme.desc: Mientras que Rusty, el perro de Susan, y Cheri, el poodle de Jake, ayudan a que sus dueños se enamoren, necesitarán un milagro navideño para lograr que sus caóticas familias lleguen a tiempo a la boda.

programme.title: Mi dulce Navidad
programme.desc: La exitosa ejecutiva de marketing Sadie es hija de los dueños de una tienda de chocolate tradicional en un pequeño pueblo de Estados Unidos. Decide pasar la Navidad en su ciudad natal y descubre que sus padres planean vender la tienda.

programme.title: Navidad en buena forma
programme.desc: Un romance navideño entre una profesora de gimnasia y un hombre de negocios. Las chispas vuelan, y el amor cambia todo, en especial en las fiestas. Amanda Kloots, coconductora de The Talk, formará parte del festival de cine de Sundance de este año.

programme.title: Navidad Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Con solo dos días antes de Navidad, Angelina se embarca en una misión casi imposible para tratar de salvar a su malcriada hija de 14 años, de ir por el camino equivocado. ¿Podrá Angelina sacar a su hija de la lista de los traviesos?
