programme.title: Christmas Carol: The Movie
programme.desc: Capture the spirit of Christmas with this animated classic! Based on one of the most beloved holiday tales of all time and featuring the voices of some of today's brightest stars, this enchanting film is a very merry treat for the whole family!

programme.title: Jingle Bells
programme.desc: A merry elf reveals how a loving farm family learns that the very best holiday gifts come from the heart. Voices of this animated tale include Jason Alexander and Don Knotts.

programme.title: An All Dogs Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Three canines itch and scratch their way through everything and anything in an effort to save Christmas from an evil spirit (Carface) who wants to use dogs from all over the world to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas Carol: The Movie
programme.desc: Capture the spirit of Christmas with this animated classic! Based on one of the most beloved holiday tales of all time and featuring the voices of some of today's brightest stars, this enchanting film is a very merry treat for the whole family!

programme.title: Christmas is Here Again
programme.desc: When the evil Krad steals Santa's toy bag he crushes the holiday spirit- and the world's children forget about Christmas. Now, an orphan and her friends embark on a polar adventure to try to stop Krad from destroying Christmas.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: A kind-hearted, young orphan boy and his loyal cat discover the true spirit of Christmas in this delightfully animated Yuletide tale of musical, magical holiday cheer! Produced by Golden Films. Directed by Diane Eskenazi.

programme.title: Rock Dog
programme.desc: When a young mastiff, Bodi (Luke Wilson), discovers a radio, it takes just a few guitar licks for his fate to be sealed: Bodi wants to be a rock ‘n’ roll star!

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: Join a phe-gnome-nal adventure inside the secret world of garden gnomes! When Gnomeo and Juliet discover their friends are missing, they team up with detective SHERLOCK GNOMES to solve the mystery and bring the gnomes home in this family comedy.

programme.title: Igor
programme.desc: In a world filled with Mad Scientists and Evil Inventions, one talented evil scientist's hunch-backed lab assistant has big dreams of becoming a Mad Scientist himself and winning the annual Evil Science Fair.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: Join a phe-gnome-nal adventure inside the secret world of garden gnomes! When Gnomeo and Juliet discover their friends are missing, they team up with detective SHERLOCK GNOMES to solve the mystery and bring the gnomes home in this family comedy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon’s son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can’t be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.desc: Linda Sobek, a pretty, vivacious Los Angeles model turns up missing after a photo shoot. The police investigation leads to photographer Charles Rathbun, who, after much back-and-forth, says he killed her by accident.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: A woman who had been married 10 times, sometimes committing bigamy, goes on trial for murdering her last husband.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Jack and Linda Jones, a Florida couple, seemed to have the perfect life--until Jack turned up dead.

programme.desc: Cotton, Newbern, and Finnegan learn how a simple suspension upgrade can become a house of cards; major snags are hit and overcome as they attempt to run an 8-second pass with their supercharged barn-find '67 Firebird known as the Rubber Duck.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Freiburger makes a sight-unseen purchase of a 1973 AMC Hornet that raced Baja in the '80s and finished the NORRA 1000 a couple of times before being parked circa 2012.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: David and Steve build up a cool, vintage body style by adding extra doors to a 1966 Chevelle they picked up for $1,000; it's all about fast and cheap trying to get this muscle car out for some sideways action on a dirt oval.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan

programme.title: El extraordinario siglo XX
programme.desc: Después de una regresión mundial, la década de 1930 vio un grupo en ascenso de fascistas que comenzaba a dominar el nuevo mundo y amenazaba con arrastrar al mundo de regreso a la guerra.

programme.title: El extraordinario siglo XX
programme.desc: Una década que comenzó con el estallido de la guerra terminaría también con el mejor intento de paz mundial. A pesar de sus horrores, la iconografía de la década estaría ligada para siempre a ella.

programme.title: El precio de la historia

programme.desc: Dulce, Nuevo México, es un punto de acceso para fenómenos misteriosos y una supuesta colaboración militar secreta entre humanos y extraterrestres.

programme.desc: Se explora el secuestro de Barney y Betty Hill, y el incidente de Zeta reticuli.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Mississippi
programme.desc: No hay ningún río en la tierra donde se soñaron tantos sueños, donde tantos sueños se hicieron realidad o se desmoronaron, donde la línea divisoria entre la vida y la muerte es tan delgada como en el Mississippi, el gran río de América del Norte.

programme.title: Mississippi
programme.desc: El Mississippi es el tercer río más grande del mundo, y abastece a 31 estados de Estados Unidos y dos provincias de Canadá. Sin embargo, este río tan importante ha cambiado dramáticamente con el paso del tiempo.

programme.title: Tierra de duendecillos
programme.desc: Madagascar es un mundo extraño y único de endemismo biológico sin paralelo. La cuarta isla más antigua del mundo y la más grande, ha estado aislada durante 88 millones de años.

programme.title: Tierra de duendecillos
programme.desc: En este episodio exploramos la vida de las criaturas de sangre fría de Madagascar. Los camaleones, las ranas, los lagartos y las serpientes se han adaptado para sobrevivir en la isla.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Eche una nueva mirada a Nueva Caledonia. Experimente el estilo de vida local, visite una laguna increíble y encuentre paisajes asombrosos en cada esquina.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Qatar es diminuto en superficie, pero enorme en ambición. Filmado desde todos los ángulos, y en medio de un auge de la construcción, sea testigo del futuro emerger del desierto.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En el paraíso de St. Martin, Tony come una saludable comida rastafari con un luchador por la libertad, ayuda a preparar la comida, descubre la comida que no está disponible en los supermercados de Estados Unidos y se relaja en un bar de la playa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: En New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony atrapa un caimán Bayou, se refresca con helado mundialmente famoso, tiene problemas con la ley, come jambalaya con un chef bailarín y se relaja con un poco de jazz local.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Conocida como la capital de la felicidad de Brasil, Salvador da Bahía ofrece una variedad de mercados. Aquí, Tony participa en una ceremonia tradicional local y experimenta los talentos culinarios del famoso artista de la cocina bahiana: el chef Dada.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubre el alma de la cultura menorquina. Considerada la más atractiva de las Islas Baleares, Menorca está salpicada de destacados yacimientos prehistóricos, bordeada por escarpados acantilados y bendecida con un encanto irresistible.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Esta es la legendaria St. Barts, una isla que ha combinado con éxito las tradiciones con el modernismo y sigue siendo un destino principal.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: En este episodio, podemos observar las tácticas creativas que usan los animales para encontrar a las mejores parejas y lograr conquistarlas.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Las montañas de Varunga son la personificación de las fantasías occidentales sobre el África profunda y oscura, donde habitan algunos de los animales más emblemáticos del mundo.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Africa's Big Cats es una mirada cercana a la vida de tres familias de los depredadores felinos más efectivos e icónicos de África que viven en el famoso Parque Kruger: una leona, un leopardo y dos guepardos.

programme.desc: Pat consigue un trabajo en el Chum Bucket y compite con Bob Esponja en los juegos Fry Cook; Bob Esponja lleva una manada de medusas al Sr. Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Como Don Cangrejo es injusto con sus empleados, Bob Esponja y Calamardo deciden hacer una huelga. Una lombriz aterroriza Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo no está permitido en la casa del árbol de Bob Esponja y Patricio; luego, Bob Esponja adopta un caballito de mar, y se lo lleva por todas partes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja descubre que Calamardo nunca ha probado una Krabby Patty; y luego, Bob Esponja es preocupado por un nuevo alumno en la escuela de canotaje.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo y Bob Esponja ocultan el cuerpo de un inspector de sanidad; Bob Esponja y Patricio tiran su nueva TV y conservan la caja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio le muestran a Calamardo una ó dos cosas acerca de la nieve en `The Snowball Effect', y en `One Krab's Trash', el Sr Krabs accidentalmente vende un sombrero valioso a Bob Esponja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El estrellato se sube a la cabeza de Bob Esponja después de que él aparece en el comercial de bajo presupuesto del Crustáceo Cascarudo; Calamardo se empobrece.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta convencer a un portero de que él es suficientemente fuerte para entrar a la Escupidera de Salty. El archienemigo de Calamardo regresa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene pesadillas tras haber visto una película de terror: cree que los robots han tomado el control del mundo. Bob Esponja y Patricio han encontrado una pequeña almeja y deciden adoptarla y protegerla hasta que sea mayor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo sabiamente elige a Bob Esponja y a Patricio para decorar su sala de estar; luego, aprenden acerca de ser un excelente empleado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja pasa una noche en la cárcel después de ser detenido por la policía tratando de entrar a su casa, después de que accidentalmente se queda por fuera durante una fiesta.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja y Patricio venden barras de chocolate de puerta en puerta, terminan comprando más de lo que venden. Superhéroes los visitan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja olvida quien es él cuando pierde su etiqueta de identidad; Plankton celebra los 25 años tratando de robar la receta secreta del restaurant Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Es "Fondo de Bikini" prehistórico y pasamos un día en la vida de SpongeGar, Patar y Squog; nuestros tres amigos neandertales descubren el fuego, sólo para apagarlo.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Finalmente cansado de hacer favores para que Lori pasee, Lincoln decide ayudar a Leni pasar su prueba de conducción; Lincoln y nueve de sus hermanas trabajan en equipo para frustrar la tiranía que enfrentan con Lori como su niñera.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene el plan de sentarse en el mejor asiento del carro para el largo viaje. Él debe probar que está lo suficientemente maduro como para sentarse en la mesa con los adultos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln debe apurar a sus hermanas para no llegar tarde a la escuela; Lincoln consigue la aprobación decisiva para las vacaciones familiares.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hace todo lo posible por no oír a sus hermanas; Lynn se pelea con Lucy y Lincoln deja que Lynn pase la noche en su cuarto.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere capturar la fotografía perfecta de su familia como obsequio para sus padres por motivo de su aniversario de bodas; Lincoln hace una apuesta con sus hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La nueva piscina de Lincoln resulta demasiado pequeña y él y sus diez hermanas no pueden usarla al mismo tiempo; Lincoln trata de manipular a Lily para que crezca desarrollando la mentalidad que a él le agrada, no como sus otras hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En esta edición especial de The Maury Show, Maury invita a celebridades al escenario para compartir algunas de las imágenes reales más intensas e impactantes jamás grabadas.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se niega a entregarse a la policía y toma a Valeria de escudo. Después dispara contra la policía, hiriendo a uno de ellos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jacqueline le habla a Rosaura de todo el amor que siente por Silvano y de que va a luchar por ese amor ya que esta segura que Rosaura no lo ama como él ama ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidelia le pide perdón a Rosaura por no haberle dicho lo de la niña. Ella la perdona. Jacqueline le reclama a Silvano que se va a casar con Rosaura sin quererla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Sonia le pide perdón a Rosaura. Guillermo aconseja a Silvano de que piense antes de casarse con Rosaura porque aparentemente esta enamorado de Jacqueline. Guillermo llega y ve a Luisana llorando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio se lanza por una ventana al vacío, gritando el nombre de Rosaura. Rosaura le grita a Luis Mario porque no le había dicho nada de su hija. Le dice que como cree que él se lo había ocultado.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le cuenta a Rosaura que Eduarda mató a Rafael el día de su boda con Claudia, que Eduarda pensaba matarla a ella pero él impidió que se tomara el veneno.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Patricio que lo considera su hermano. Él le pide perdón y le dice también que el y Camelia son bígamos. Rosaura sigue a Eduarda, quien baja corriendo y sigue corriendo en la calle.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La doctora dice que Eduarda a lo mejor no sobreviva. Patricio quiere darle el divorcio a Rosaura para que sea libre. Jacqueline se monta en la camioneta de Silvano y se va dejándolo solo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Vive y deja morir
programme.desc: James Bond lucha contra las fuerzas de la magia negra en esta aventura de alto impacto que lo lanza desde las calles de Nueva York hasta los pantanosos paisajes de Louisiana.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: The heat is on in this fast-paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friend's killer in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop.

programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out how the anteater is able to eat nearly 10,000 insects every day. And why the walrus is considered a keystone species in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.desc: Staying alive in Asia’s barren heartland of desert and dry grasslands is a challenge, yet many animals thrive.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Mexico and chocolate go together like salsa and chips. A few Mexico City chocolatiers see more potential for Mexican chocolate beyond churros. They see single-origin chocolate bars, lovely hand-formed truffles, even ambitious sculptures.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: As notable restaurants have increased in Mexico City, so have local culinary schools. Rick visits the Coronado Cooking School whose mission is to educate the next generation of chefs. Rick also hosts students in the Frontera Test Kitchens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences two important Sonoran culinary traditions. First, on the coast in Bahía Kino, local fishermen receive 'the blessing' from a woman from the Seri tribe before heading out on the water to catch giant sea scallops.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It’s an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo’s oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he’ll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ken Oringer joins Ming Tsai to whip up some weekend favorites. Ken makes King Crab Nachos with Nduja Queso Fundido. Ming makes Rice Cake Nachos topped with a savory vegetarian beef substitute. It's nachos two ways!

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming cooks at home with James Beard Award-winning chef Michael Schlow. Michael makes Spicy Shrimp with Fregola and Chickpeas. Ming follows that up with a colorful Togarashi Shrimp with Miso Risotto, Edamame, and Watercress.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1950s heralds the end of vacuum tubes and the rise of mobile technologies when two Japanese inventors shrink cabinet-size radios down to something small enough to fit in your pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1960s is a decade of both cultural and technological change. Home entertainment goes from the kitchen table to the TV screen when the video game console is unveiled.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The cell phone moves from the car console to the hand when an engineer is inspired by a science fiction series. The hybrid car is reborn as an answer to the concerns over fossil fuels.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1980s launch an unprecedented technological age that will continue into the next century. DNA profiling begins changing crime scene investigations for all time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: A new telescope named Hubble lets us see even further into the universe, revealing more of its majesty and mysteries. A young software engineer's wife gives birth to his daughter while he develops the camera phone in the waiting room.

programme.title: Living in the Time of Jesus
programme.desc: Jesus is said to have overturned the tables of moneychangers in the Temple. But who were these people, and whose money were they changing? Host Arne Kislenko opens a window into how people made ends meet 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Living in the Time of Jesus
programme.desc: When you got sick in the first century, what did you do about it? Host Arne Kislenko investigates the many sides of ancient health care to discover what people in Jesus’ time knew—and didn’t know—about medicine.

programme.title: Living in the Time of Jesus
programme.desc: Two thousand years ago, temple guards and soldiers arrested Jesus, setting in motion the most infamous trial of all time. Host Arne Kislenko moves through modern Jerusalem to pick up clues about what law and order looked like in the first century.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call... All except two, that is: Odysseus, and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since the Greek forces arrived in Troy, but King Priam's city has still not fallen. The king's eldest son, Hector, reproaches his brother Paris for causing this war with no end.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Agamemnon has seen it in a dream: Troy will be taken today. Helen's husband Menelaus recognizes Paris, the man who took his wife. The two men decide to face each other in a duel.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The chaos that reigns between Greeks and Trojans has now spread to Mount Olympus. Back on the battlefield, the Trojans have driven back the Greeks, and decide to build a long wall.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas (Blue Ant International)

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas (Blue Ant International)

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas (Blue Ant International)
programme.desc: Every Hubble image begins in black and white, so why are Hubble’s pictures so colourful? The telescope has a wide range of filters that can be assigned different colours.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas (Blue Ant International)
programme.desc: Our ancestors thought the sky was flat, but we now know it as a place of infinite depth.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas (Blue Ant International)

programme.title: The Apollo Chronicles

programme.title: Bad Santa 2

programme.title: Cleaner

programme.desc: After several interruptions, including yet another Team Rocket scheme, Ash’s battle against Jasmine at the Olivine Gym is finally getting under way!

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer buscada por la policía intenta mentirles a los agentes pero es delatada por su hermano. Las verduras enlatadas vuelan durante una pelea entre compañeras. Una pareja aprende el valor de la honestidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre da su perspectiva sobre su propio arresto. Los oficiales tienen que lidiar con un hombre agresivo y salsa de BBQ. Una persecución a baja velocidad termina en casa de la novia del conductor.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Teyla begins to see apparitions of ancients in distress and believes they are the ghosts of the Ancients recently massacred by the Replicators. McKay believes he's found the whale that saved him a year ago while trapped in a submerged puddle jumper.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When a super gigantic Robot invades Pacopolis, wielding a weapon that renders the power berries powerless, Pac-Man faces the ultimate challenge and nearly succumbs to doubts that without the berries he is not really a hero.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Apex, the Pointy-head alien, strikes a deal with the Netherworld to join forces and take over PacWorld, but Betrayus has no idea that the aliens are even more duplicitous than he is.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac fails his driver's license test because of a ridiculously strict Hovering Vehicles Department employee, Mr. Strickler. Then, to save Pac-World, Pac has to fly the Paccerchini into the Netherworld,

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: It looks like Betrayus' fortunes are changing when he summons a Nether-Witch to curse Pac Man with bad luck. The only catch is, the witch will only turn over the potion if Betrayus promises to marry her.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks lures a giant Ghosteroidto threaten PacWorld, and Pac-Man must grow to planet proportions to save the day. But who's gonna save Planet Pac from the repercussions of his enlargement?

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pinky is so jealous of Pac's friendship with Cyli, she tries to get rid of her rival.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Dr. Buttocks gets a map leading to the ancient, lost city of PacLantis, Pac, Cyli and Spiral voyage to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Once every 100 Halloweens, the two moons of PacWorld turn blue, so Betrayus summons the sinister Count Pacula to drain the last Yellow Orb in PacWorld - namely Pac-Man!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When a super gigantic Robot invades Pacopolis, wielding a weapon that renders the power berries powerless, Pac-Man faces the ultimate challenge and nearly succumbs to doubts that without the berries he is not really a hero.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Apex, the Pointy-head alien, strikes a deal with the Netherworld to join forces and take over PacWorld, but Betrayus has no idea that the aliens are even more duplicitous than he is.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Heloise posts an embarrassing video of Lucius on 'Spew Tube', it's up to Jimmy to restore the evil leader's bad reputation. --- Heloise breaks out the body swapper to get some sweet revenge after Beezy and Cerbee crash her picnic with Jimmy.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius jacks up the heat into record-breaking levels, Jimmy infuriates him by throwing a beach party. --- When Lucius bans the use of cell phones in Miseryville, Jimmy turns to Dr. Scientist to help cure Beezy‘s mobile-mania.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise’s supposedly miserable new invention turns out to be a carnival. --- In order to score tickets to see ‘Runny and the Nosebleeds’, Beezy and Jimmy get jobs babysitting the Molotov’s bratty kids.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts beating Lucius at Golf, Samy and Heloise must intervene before Lucius floods the whole town. --- Jimmy plays matchmaker to find Beezy a date to Lucius' statue-unveiling ceremony.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle balances spending time with Jace and the new baby, Kailyn tours a local college, Chelsea looks up Adam's arrest record, and Leah and Corey go to court for custody of the girls.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn sends a controversial text about Isaac to Jo, Chelsea tries speed dating, Jenelle seeks custody of Jace, and Leah meets with Corey for the first time since their custody hearing.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Dr. Drew reunites the moms to talk about the past season, including Adam's relationship with Aubree and Leah's battle for custody of her girls.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: For the second part of the reunion, Dr. Drew talks to Kailyn about her strained relationship with Vee and to Jenelle about her decision to get custody of Jace.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi butt heads when she makes plans with her friends, Jenelle wants custody of Jace, Chelsea gets bad news from Adam's lawyer, and Leah faces Corey in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah is anxious about the results of her drug test, Chelsea bonds with an unlikely ally, Kailyn and Javi air out their issues, and Nathan plans a surprise for Jenelle in St. Thomas.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Corey asks Leah for more time with the girls, Jenelle and Nathan hit a new roadbloack, Chelsea thinks Adam is abusing his visitation rights, and Kailyn and Javi go to therapy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea worries about Aubree's behavior, Javi and Kailyn discuss their future together, Corey confronts Leah about her parenting, and Jenelle finally gets to see Jace.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah makes a decision about Corey's offer, Jenelle lashes out at her mom over custody of Jace, Kailyn's marital issues affect her girls' trip, and Chelsea learns of Adam's lies in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle and Nathan come to a crossroads, Kailyn has serious doubts about her marriage, Leah struggles with Jeremy's extended absence, and Chelsea arranges a meetup with Adam's ex Taylor.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Nathan is arrested after a fight with Jenelle, Jo and Vee share big news ahead of Kailyn's birthday, Chelsea heads to court, and Leah considers professional treatment for her health.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take a big step together, Leah asks for Corey's help, Kailyn and Javi welcome Jo to the neighborhood, and Jenelle tries to save her relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to Jo living close by, Jenelle is distraught when Nathan moves on, Chelsea celebrates Aubree's graduation, and Leah leaves treatment early after a misunderstanding with Corey.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah finalizes her divorce, Chelsea manages Aubree's expectations with Cole, Kailyn considers settling out of court with Jo, and Barbara and Jenelle meet to discuss custody of Jace.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se desahoga con Norma, él no aguanta más y le pide que lo acompañe para resolver la situación a su manera. Rosario y Franco discuten por el incidente del bar, él le propone matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma recibe atención médica, todos piensan que sufre una crisis nerviosa, pero el doctor anuncia los resultados de sus análisis. Fernando estalla, los trámites del divorcio toman otro rumbo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eva tiene en sus manos una carta para Juan, Norma le pide que se la entregue para contarle por qué se aleja. Armando presenta a Pepita, la nueva cantante que despierta los celos de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara aconseja a Fernando, él sabe que ella conoce el secreto de su hermana. Óscar busca a Jimena en la casa de la montaña y ella lo provoca al llegar a una cascada, Norma los ve desnudos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le explica a Juan cuál es su decisión, ella no se resiste a besarlo. Él culpa a Óscar y le reclama su ambición cuando la boda de Jimena y Leandro está a punto de celebrarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan está destrozado y abandona la construcción de la cabaña, Fernando está furioso. Óscar y Jimena se reconcilian, angustiados por el compromiso con Leandro, buscan una salida.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma detiene a Sara para que no revele que su hermana se marchó. Juan está decidido a confesarlo todo, llega a la hacienda con Franco y se encuentran con el derrumbe de la obra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucho, Gabriela y Constanza escapan de El Paraíso. Alejandro llega al manicomio en medio del caos y da por muerta a su gran amor. Él mismo le da la noticia a David. Irene y Antonia celebran. Gabriela presencia su propio entierro y se acerca a Gastón.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela se presenta ante Gastón, Max y Francisca, pero aún no puede decirle la verdad a su hijo. Max recupera el oro escondido en la tumba de Lucía y se lo da a su hermana. Constanza se enferma y Gabriela le promete que no le hará daño a Ricardo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David cree haber visto a Gabriela y Alejandro casi la descubre. Ante las dudas, Antonia manda a Macario a vigilar. Lucho se marcha con la intención de vender el oro de los Suárez, pero Francisca desconfía de él. Gertrudis chantajea a Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Suárez se dan cuenta de que son vigilados. Es cuestión de horas para que los lobos entren a la casa. Lucho regresa justo a tiempo para ayudar a huir a Gabriela y a Constanza. Gabriela abraza a Lucho y él se alegra de no haberla defraudado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Two shy people keep missing each other, due in part to Gopher's interference; two residents of old folks home take a cruise, only to be followed by their meddling children.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie ends up in the middle of an unusual love triangle when the visiting 13-year-old son of the head of the cruise line develops a crush on her at the same time that she is trying to win over a charming older passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A singer tries to persuade his manager to let him abandon the shock tactics that made him famous and let his music speak for itself.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: One-time stowaway April Lopez returns to the ship as a popular singer. However, she grows tired of the hassles of fame and decides that she would like to become a cruise director.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher gives his parents a cruise as a Mother's Day present. Gopher's father grows jealous of the close relationship between mother and son.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: Doc marries a younger woman only to run into his ex-wife while on his honeymoon. Meanwhile, a voluptuous diet doctor hires a svelte fitness instructor to impersonate her, and a man has to tell his partner their relationship may be over.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie catches love fever on the high seas and is thinking of marriage when the Pacific Princess is chartered for a dazzling star-studded wedding cruise that takes Capt. Stubing, his crew, and their guests on a beautiful scenic journey to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Wealthy Alaskan Buddy Bowers (Lorne Greene) recruits the services of the ship to take the wedding party from Vancouver, B.C., to Skagway, Alaska, for the nuptial ceremonies for his orphaned granddaughter, Carol (Lisa Hartman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Doc (Bernie Kopell) gets the flu, he receives private treatment from a gorgeous doctor (Susan Sullivan) who keeps his fever up even when his temperature drops.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A strict IRS auditor (Phyllis Diller) falls for Capt. Stubing (Gavin MacLeod) until she finds something in his file.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Capt. Stubling (Gavin McLeod) is reunited with his love child, Vicki (Jill Whelan).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Julie (Lauren Tewes) joins the ship's secret all-male club, she is shocked by the initiation rites.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a prosperous rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from the man's vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight - Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
